title: Seed to Series B
description: Growth leadership for startups between early traction and scale, when the founder needs repeatability before a full-time senior hire.
buyerProblem: Between Seed and Series B, growth work often becomes too complex for founder instinct alone but too early for a large internal marketing team.
usefulWhen: You have paying customers but no repeatable acquisition rhythm
You need board-level clarity on growth priorities
You are deciding whether to hire, sprint, or build a system first
growthSystem: Channel, conversion, and reporting system design
proof: 20+ startups advised across AI, SaaS, fintech, healthtech, and ecommerce
Fractional CMO support for post-PMF founder-led teams
